title: Meet Kimi Web Bridge - Kimi's browser extension
summary: Kimi Web Bridge is a browser extension that allows agents to interact with websites by performing actions like searching, scrolling, clicking, and typing. It supports integration with Kimi Code CLI, Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Hermes, and other tools.
